title: NPR: Iran suspends nuclear deal talks with US after Israeli attacks on Lebanon
snippet: NPR coverage of Iran suspending talks with US. Araghchi statement on ceasefire linkage across all fronts. Largely mirrors NBC News reporting.
tag_reason: 기보도 — src-1539 (이란 협상 중단)의 NPR 보도. 동일 사건, 추가 정보 없음
